title: Papua New Guinea moves to outlaw AI deepfakes as victims call for more protection
description: Papua New Guinea prepares new laws to criminalise the malicious use of artificial intelligence, including deepfakes, voice cloning and digital impersonation.
content:
Jennifer Baing was scrolling through Facebook when she came across a photo of herself wearing revealing lingerie.
The image was fake.

title: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: The AI consumer bet might surprise you
description: Investors are betting that how people spend their time and money will change dramatically due to artificial intelligence.
content:
Money might be piling into AI, but for BAI Capital's Annabelle Yu Long, the Chinese consumer is still king.
An "unintended consequence" of AI is the transformation of how humans interact with each other — and the businesses around them, she said. Tha... [3452 chars]

title: Anthropic's $1.5B settlement of authors' AI copyright lawsuit gets greenlight
description: A federal judge in San Francisco on Monday signed off on artificial intelligence company Anthropic's landmark $1.5 billion settlement of a class action lawsuit brought by a group of authors who accused it of misusing their books to train its AI chatbot Claude.

title: Netflix Discloses Use of Generative AI in Hundreds of Films and Television Shows
description: Netflix has disclosed that it uses generative artificial intelligence (AI) in hundreds of its films and television shows, according to a shareholder letter released alongside the company’s latest financial results. The AI is primarily employed in post-production to generate complex sequences such as battle scenes, crowds and establishing shots, the company reported. The revelation came […]

title: Southern California taps AI to issue hefty street parking fines
description: Santa Monica is the first California city to use artificial intelligence-enabled cameras to issue tickets for cars blocking bike lanes, with fines clocking in at $93.
content:
